Rp[2])) + (a->coordinate.y - Rp[1])*sum_exp*(-Boys[2]*(a->coordinate.z - Rp[2])*sum_exp + Boys[3]*c->exponent*(c->coordinate.z - Rp[2])))))/(sum_exp*sum_exp*sum_exp*sum_exp*sum_exp*sum_exp) ;
	val *= d_cgto_normalization_factors[a->basis_index+5] * d_cgto_normalization_factors[b->basis_index+5] * d_auxiliary_cgto_normalization_factors[c->basis_index+5];
val *= (is_prim_id_neq) ? (d_density_matrix[(a->basis_index+5)*num_basis + b->basis_index+5] + d_density_matrix[(b->basis_index+5)*num_basis + a->basis_index+5]) : d_density_matrix[(a->basis_index+5)*num_basis + b->basis_index+5];
atomicAdd(&d_c[c->basis_index+5], val);
